steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice best emphasizes a difference between the two works. The most salient difference in the notes is material: 'Above and Below' uses aluminum tubing while 'Silver Upper White River' uses recycled silver. The correct choice must use explicit contrast language to highlight this.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — lists both works without contrasting: mentions both materials but uses no contrast signal, so no difference is emphasized. ✗
  • Choice B — 'by contrast' juxtaposing aluminum tubing vs. recycled silver: explicit contrast language directly emphasizes the material difference between the two works. ✓
  • Choice C — focuses on the Vietnam Memorial: shifts focus to a third work rather than comparing the two works in question. ✗
  • Choice D — does not mention 'Silver Upper White River': cannot emphasize a difference between two works if only one is discussed. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
